summary: Phase 5 Subscription Billing testing completed. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Landing page pricing (3 plans), billing page, trial banners, upgrade modal, plan change functionality.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/subscription/plans returns all 3 plans (Solo, Portfolio, Operator)
Backend: Solo plan - £19/month, £190/year, 1 property limit
Backend: Portfolio plan - £39/month, £390/year, 5 property limit
Backend: Operator plan - £79/month, £790/year, 15 property limit
Backend: Plans endpoint includes trial_days=14
Backend: GET /api/subscription requires authentication
Backend: GET /api/subscription returns plan details with all required fields
Backend: Subscription includes trial_start, trial_end, trial_days_remaining
Backend: GET /api/subscription/check-limit requires authentication
Backend: Check-limit returns allowed, current_count, limit, plan fields
Backend: Check-limit returns allowed=false when at property limit
Backend: POST /api/subscription/change requires authentication
Backend: Invalid plan name rejected with 400
Backend: Upgrade to Portfolio works correctly
Backend: Downgrade blocked if property count exceeds new plan limit
Backend: New signup creates user with Solo plan, trial status, 14-day trial
Backend: Constants endpoint includes subscription_plans and trial_days
Backend: /api/auth/me includes subscription fields
Frontend: Landing page shows 3 pricing plans (Solo £19, Portfolio £39, Operator £79)
Frontend: Landing page shows 'Most Popular' badge on Portfolio plan
Frontend: Landing page shows '14-day free trial on all plans'
Frontend: Dashboard shows trial banner with days remaining for trial users
Frontend: Dashboard trial banner shows 'Upgrade Now' button
Frontend: Sidebar shows 'CURRENT PLAN: Free Trial' with 'Upgrade Plan' link
Frontend: Billing page shows 'Free Trial Active' banner for trial users
Frontend: Billing page shows current subscription (plan, status, properties, price)
Frontend: Billing page shows all 3 plan cards with correct pricing
Frontend: Billing page shows 'Current Plan' badge on active plan
Frontend: Billing page shows Upgrade/Downgrade buttons appropriately
Frontend: Billing page shows Billing History placeholder
Frontend: Billing page shows Payment Method placeholder (Stripe coming soon)
Frontend: Upgrade modal appears when trying to add property at limit
Frontend: Upgrade modal shows current plan, property count, and upgrade option
Frontend: Upgrade modal has 'Upgrade Now', 'Maybe Later', 'View All Plans' buttons

test_credentials.trial_user: trialtest@staylet.com / Test1234! (upgraded to Portfolio during testing)
test_credentials.limit_user: bugtest@staylet.com / Test1234! (Solo plan with 2 properties, at limit)

seed_data_creation: New test users created during signup tests are isolated
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 subscription billing fully implemented and tested. Backend has /api/subscription, /api/subscription/plans, /api/subscription/check-limit, /api/subscription/change endpoints. Frontend has BillingPage with plan cards, UpgradePlanModal for limit enforcement, trial banners on Dashboard and BillingPage. Plan limits: Solo=1, Portfolio=5, Operator=15 properties. 14-day free trial on signup. Stripe payment is MOCKED (placeholder UI only).

mocked_features.stripe_payment: Placeholder UI on billing page - 'Payment processing via Stripe coming soon'
mocked_features.email_reminders: UI toggle exists but no actual email sending

plan_change.downgrade: Blocked if property count exceeds new plan limit

ui_components.landing_page_pricing: 3 plan cards with features and CTA buttons
ui_components.billing_page: Current subscription, available plans, billing history, payment method
ui_components.trial_banner_dashboard: Shows days remaining, plan info, upgrade button
ui_components.trial_banner_billing: Shows trial end date, plan features
ui_components.sidebar_plan_status: Shows 'Free Trial' or plan name with upgrade link
